ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., Above 28, 18-22) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the user (e.g., 12th grade, Bachelor's Degree) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the user (e.g., Arts, Psychology and Sociology, Engineering) */,
  "settlement" TEXT /* Type of settlement of the user (e.g., Rural, Urban) */,
  "social_media_usage" TEXT /* Social media usage category of the user (e.g., >3, 2 to 3) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_field_of_study FOREIGN KEY ("field_of_study") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_settlement FOREIGN KEY ("settlement") REFERENCES settlements ("settlement_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educations ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_social_media_usage FOREIGN KEY ("social_media_usage") REFERENCES social_media_usage ("social_media_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Above 28, 18-22) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational background */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational background (e.g., 12th grade, Bachelor's Degree) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study (e.g., Arts, Psychology and Sociology, Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlements" (
  "settlement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of settlement */,
  "settlement_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of settlement (e.g., Rural, Urban) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the settlement */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the settlement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_usage" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media usage category */,
  "social_media_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media usage category (e.g., >3, 2 to 3) */,
  "average_daily_usage_minutes" INTEGER /* Average daily usage in minutes */,
  "platforms_used" TEXT /* List of platforms used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_of_life" (
  "qol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality of life data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "iat" INTEGER /* IAT (Implicit Association Test) score */,
  "qol" INTEGER /* Quality of life score */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the quality of life data was collected */,
  "physical_health_score" INTEGER /* Score for physical health */,
  "mental_health_score" INTEGER /* Score for mental health */,
  "social_wellbeing_score" INTEGER /* Score for social well-being */,
  "environmental_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score for environmental quality */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Overall satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
